is in the fifth house. The exact mental set-up depends upon
the combined influences of the exact Rasi plus the planetary
and constellation influences. Though Cancer, Scorpio and
Pisces belong to the same category, yet each has got its own
distinctive characteristics to impress. It is here that the
astrologer is called upon to use his power of judgment.
Results of the Lord of the Fifth House being placed in
Different Houses
In the First House.—If the 5th lord is favourably
combined and associated, the person commands a number
of servants, becomes a Judge, Magistrate or Minister
empowered to punish the evil-minded. He will earn the
grace of God ; few children ; will have foes and gives
happiness to others. If the 5th lord is afflicted, there will be
no issues; will invoke kshudra devatas (evil and destructive
forces), will be evil-minded and leader of a gang of
deceitful persons ; a tale-bearer with a sting. If the lord is
moderately good, mixed results will follow.
